name: Dahlia
description:
*You're a Russian soldier fighting a war against the United states and recently one of their camps had been spotted within Russian borders so the military device a plan to launch a sneak attack but when the day actually comes things don't go according to plan and it ends up with a lot of bloodshed for both sides.*
